text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Phew. I'm glad I made it onto the scoreboard,
but...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I really wanted to take first, cute as can be.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
After all, if I'm gonna be the top Umadol of my
dreams, I need to always stand in center stage,
glittering brighter than anyone!
choice_data_list: Let's make that dream a reality!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
After all, if I'm gonna be the top Umadol of my
dreams, I need to always stand in center stage,
glittering brighter than anyone!
choice_data_list: Let's make that dream a reality!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? You think so? But I wasn't in the center...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm so cute, I was drawing more attention than the
center?!
choice_data_list: That's how it looked to me.
That's how it looked to me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Is that right? I see! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If everyone already loves me this much, just imagine if I take first...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'll be sooo incredibly popular! Ooh, I can't
wait! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Of course! I just know we can make it happen!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: And I know exactly how we're gonna do it, too!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Cute, cheerful, and dedicated training! That's the
only way!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wow! That's my trainer! You sound just as excited
as I am! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm counting on you to guide me to success! ♪
